mechanics.excerpt: Soldiers prefer the laser because f its light weight and reliability: Most lasers are rugged and have few moving parts significantly reducing the potentia Ior breakdown; When they do malfunction_ however; repairs cannot be accomplished easily in the field, as specialized skills ad tools are required for all but the simplest of jobs_ Gyrojet Weapons Gyrojet guns are recoilless weapons tnat fire self-Dro- pelled explosive-tipped projectile.
